title: Junior Business Development Manager at Knight Frank India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Knight Frank India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Knight Frank India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Knight Frank India:
Knight Frank India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Knight Frank India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
